attacking_style: Tactically opportunistic from breakaways, launching well-timed attacks in the final 200m on uphill gradients. Uses positioning and parasitic tactics before explosive finishing kick.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish clear team tactical patterns from single race observation.
terrain_preference: Uphill sprint finishes where gradient allows him to exploit power differential in final meters. Breakaway scenarios where tactical positioning matters more than pure sprint speed.
vulnerability: Likely vulnerable in pure flat bunch sprints against top-tier sprinters, hence preference for breakaway opportunities. Requires specific finish gradient to maximize effectiveness.
key_patterns: Insufficient observations (n=1) to establish repeating patterns with confidence.
Single observation shows: parasitic positioning on stronger riders before late attack.
Single observation shows: 200m attack timing on uphill gradient finish.
form_trajectory: unknown: only single race observation from 2018, insufficient recent data for trajectory assessment
